summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 'Monthly Orientation' feature completed. All 17 tests PASSED. Feature creates a monthly reset and direction-setting loop showing last month's dominant pattern and this month's recommended direction. Clearing localStorage 'philos_monthly_orientation' triggers orientation section to appear at top of Home tab. Section shows correct Hebrew content with RTL layout. Start Month button (התחל את החודש) is clickable, section disappears after clicking, localStorage saves metadata correctly (monthId, timestamp, month_started, monthly_orientation_direction, monthly_pattern_reference, last_month_decisions, recommendation_reason), and orientation doesn't reappear after page reload. Weekly and Daily orientations properly show after monthly is dismissed.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Component uses data-testid attributes (monthly-orientation-section, last-month-pattern, monthly-recommendation, start-month-btn)
GOOD: RTL layout with dir='rtl' on section element
GOOD: LocalStorage persistence using 'philos_monthly_orientation' key with proper metadata structure
GOOD: New month detection via getMonthId() function comparing year-month format (e.g., 2026-M03)
GOOD: Last month pattern analysis (analyzeLastMonthPatterns) processes history for previous month decisions
GOOD: Recommended direction based on last month's pattern (harm → recovery, avoidance → order, etc.)
GOOD: Teal/Cyan color scheme (from-teal-50 to-cyan-50) differentiates from weekly (purple) and daily (amber)
GOOD: Monthly appears before weekly and daily orientations in component hierarchy
GOOD: Hebrew month names properly displayed using hebrewMonths array
seed_data_creation: None required - localStorage manipulation simulates new month
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly Orientation feature is fully functional. To trigger orientation: localStorage.removeItem('philos_monthly_orientation'); then reload page. Section appears at top of Home tab before weekly and daily orientations. After clicking 'התחל את החודש', section disappears and localStorage stores: {monthId, timestamp, month_started, monthly_orientation_direction, monthly_pattern_reference, last_month_decisions, recommendation_reason}. Key data-testids: monthly-orientation-section, last-month-pattern, monthly-recommendation, start-month-btn. Visual hierarchy: Monthly (teal) → Weekly (purple) → Daily (amber).

feature_tests.test: Section shows 'החודש החדש מתחיל מתוך הדפוס של החודש שעבר.'
Last month pattern shows correct text
Last month section shows Hebrew month name (פברואר)
Start Month button has correct text (התחל את החודש)
Monthly orientation section disappears after clicking
Monthly orientation doesn't reappear on page reload
Weekly and Daily orientations show after monthly dismissed

monthly_orientation.subheader: החודש החדש מתחיל מתוך הדפוס של החודש שעבר.

last_month_section.label: Hebrew month name (e.g., פברואר)
last_month_section.with_activity: בלט דפוס של [pattern description]. + strongest positive/negative

this_month_section.label: החודש
this_month_section.recommendation_insight: Dynamic based on last month pattern

start_month_button.action: Saves to localStorage and hides section
